Note.Para: Any function that operates normally may be used.

MaintenanceNote.Para: The Core Network System consists of the Network Interface Module (NIM), Ethernet Gateway Module (EGM), Controller Server Module (CSM), Crew information system / maintenance system (CIS/MS), Airline File Server Modules (FSM), hosted applications, and the core network cabinet. An inoperative core network system or supporting component may render one or more of the following functions inoperative:

ListItem.Para: Maintenance laptop interfaces (both wired and wireless) to:
System Maintenance Pages
Synoptics
Circuit breakers
Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF)

Note.Para: The above functions can still be accessed via Flight Deck Multi-Function Displays

ListItem.Para: e-Logbook

Note.Para: The e-Logbook can still be accessed directly via the Electronic Flight Bags.

ListItem.Para: Airplane Condition Monitoring Function (ACMF)
IFE maintenance screens
CSS maintenance screens
All software and database data load functions
Broadband off-board communication or wireless gatelink:
Upload of parts via Boeing Electronic Distribution of Software (BEDS)
Download of recorded data (ACMF, engine, etc.) via BEDS
Upload & download of EFB data (charts, logbook data, airport database, etc.). The airplane must be dispatched using MEL item 46-11-01.
Core Network quick access recorder functions
Onboard maintenance information, if hosted on the Core Network
Airport map function. The airplane must be dispatched using MEL item 31-61-13.
Flight deck printer (except via either EFB). The airplane must be dispatched using MEL item 31-33-01.
Flight deck door video surveillance. The airplane must be dispatched using MEL item 23-75-01.

OperationNote.Para: An inoperative Core Network System or supporting component may render the following functions inoperative:

ListItem.Para: ACARS communication to or from the EFBs. Manual entry of preflight EFB and/or Flight Management Function inputs may be required.
Airport map function.
Flight deck printer (except via either EFB).
Flight deck door video surveillance.
